summary: Comprehensive testing of CreatorStudio AI UI/UX improvements and Cashfree payment integration. All requested features verified working: Admin login, Reel Generator dark theme, Story Generator dark theme, Share modal with visible Copy Link button, Cashfree payment gateway health check, and mobile responsiveness.
critical_code_review_comments: Character limits (300 chars) properly implemented for Printable Story Book fields with visual counters
ShareButton.js correctly implements emerald green Copy Link button with bg-emerald-600 class
Dark theme gradients properly applied: slate-900/indigo-950 for Reel Generator, slate-900/purple-950 for Story Generator
All social media share icons (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) have proper data-testid attributes
Cashfree payment gateway properly configured in PRODUCTION mode with health check endpoint
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin and demo users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI/UX improvements verified. Dark themes working on both Reel Generator and Story Generator. Share modal shows all 4 social media icons and emerald green Copy Link button. Cashfree payment gateway configured and healthy. Character limits (300 chars) implemented in Printable Story Book personalization fields.

ADMIN_LOGIN.details: Admin login with credentials admin@creatorstudio.ai / Cr3@t0rStud!o#2026 working correctly. Returns ADMIN role with 999999 credits.

REEL_GENERATOR_DARK_THEME.details: Professional dark theme with slate-900/indigo-950 gradient background. Generate button working, text properly aligned, form elements visible.

STORY_GENERATOR_DARK_THEME.details: Professional dark theme with slate-900/purple-950 gradient background. Generate button working, PDF download button visible, story generation successful.

SHARE_MODAL.details: Dark theme modal with visible Copy Link button (emerald green bg-emerald-600). All 4 social media icons (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) visible with proper data-testid attributes.

CASHFREE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY.details: Health check endpoint returns healthy status. Gateway configured in PRODUCTION mode. Products endpoint returns all 5 product tiers (starter, creator, pro, quarterly, yearly).

PRINTABLE_STORY_BOOK_CHAR_LIMITS.details: Character limits (300 chars max) implemented for child_name, dedication, and birthday_message fields with visual counters showing X/300 characters.

MOBILE_RESPONSIVENESS.details: Dark theme pages responsive on mobile (390x844). Dashboard cards stack vertically, form elements properly sized, navigation works correctly.

screenshots_taken: 10_share_modal.png - Share modal with social icons and Copy Link
